zh.Caernarfonshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger de Puleston於1229年出生在英國史洛普爾時，他的父親Roger de Puleston31歲，母親Agnes Monthermer22歲。他和Jane le Clerk至少有1個兒子。他於1691年住在英國爾。他於1284年在英國威爾斯安格萊被列為sheriff。他去世於1294年在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger de Puleston于1229年出生在英国史洛普爾时，他的父亲Roger de Puleston31岁，母亲Agnes Monthermer22岁。他和Jane le Clerk至少有1个儿子。他于1691年住在英国爾。他于1284年在英国威尔斯安格萊被列为sheriff。他去世于1294年在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Puleston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Puleston (Shrops), which is recorded as Plivesdone in 1086 and Pivelesdon’ in 1200. The place-name probably derives from an Old English personal name * Peofel (genitive * Peofeles) + Old English dūn ‘hill’. See also Pilson .

variants.name: Pilson
meanings: perhaps a variant of Puleston, a habitational name from the Shropshire placename Puleston, or, alternatively, a variant of Poulson with unrounding of the vowel.
perhaps a variant of Pelson (now rare or extinct in Britain), from the Middle English personal name Pell (see Pell ) + son.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger de Puleston was born in 1229, in Shropshire, England, his father, Roger de Puleston, was 31 and his mother, Agnes Monthermer, was 22. He had at least 1 son with Jane le Clerk. He lived in Cheshire, England in 1691. In 1284, his occupation is listed as sheriff in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom. He died in 1294, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.Caernarfon, Caernarvonshire, Wales: Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger de Puleston est né en 1229, à Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Puleston, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes Monthermer, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Jane le Clerk. Il a vécu à Cheshire, Angleterre en 1691. En 1284, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff à Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1294, à Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger de Puleston 1229 in Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Puleston 31 und seine Mutter Agnes Monthermer 22. Er hatte mit Jane le Clerk mindestens 1 Sohn. 1691 hat er in Cheshire, England gelebt. 1284 ist sein Beruf als sheriff in Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb 1294 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Puleston è nato il nel 1229 nel Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Roger de Puleston, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Monthermer, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Jane le Clerk. Vissuto a Cheshire, England nel 1691. Nel 1284, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff nel Anglesey, Galles, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1294, nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Pulestonが1229年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Roger de Pulestonは31歳，母Agnes Monthermerは22歳であった。彼はJane le Clerkとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1691年にはイギリスチェシュアイアに住んでいた。1284年，イギリスウェールズアングレセイでの職業はsheriffと記録されている。彼は1294年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Puleston(이)가 1229년 영국 슈럽실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Puleston(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Monthermer(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Jane le Clerk(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1691년도에 영국 체실르에서 살았다. 1284년, 그의 직업은 영국 웨일스 앤글레시에서 sheriff이었다. 그는 1294년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Puleston nasceu em 1229, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Puleston, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Monthermer, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Jane le Clerk. Ele viveu em Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1691. Em 1284, sua profissão aparece como sheriff em Anglesey, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1294, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger de Puleston родился в 1229 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Puleston было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Monthermer, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Jane le Clerk. Он жил в местности чешир, Англия в 1691 году. В 1284 году он работал по профессии sheriff в местности англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер в 1294 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger de Puleston nació en 1229, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Puleston, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Agnes Monthermer, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Jane le Clerk. Vivió en Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1691. En 1284, su ocupación registrada era sheriff en Isla Oscura, Gales, Reino Unido. Murió en 1294, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
